title: (Bullish Signal) ARWR enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 13, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ARWR's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 71 similar cases where ARWR's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 67 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $67.74 crossed the resistance line at $66.26 and is trading between $68.68 resistance and $66.26 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/11/21 - 04/13/21, the price experienced a -13% Downtrend. During the week of 04/06/21 - 04/13/21, the stock fell -2%.

https://preview.redd.it/ob1utd95f6t61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=b91d844e34af124b54363a25ec132150bbc4840b

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 2 days, which means it's wise to expect a price bounce in the near future.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ARWR just turned positive on April 01, 2021. Looking at past instances where ARWR's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 36 of 38 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +2.86% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ARWR advanced for three days, in 266 of 294 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

ARWR may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
